ddls:
CREATE TABLE "home_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the data entry */,
  "home_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the home */,
  "appliances" INTEGER /* Energy consumption of appliances in the home */,
  "kitchen_temp" REAL /* Temperature in the kitchen */,
  "kitchen_humid" REAL /* Humidity in the kitchen */,
  "living_temp" REAL /* Temperature in the living room */,
  "living_humid" REAL /* Humidity in the living room */,
  "laundry_temp" REAL /* Temperature in the laundry room */,
  "laundry_humid" REAL /* Humidity in the laundry room */,
  "office_temp" REAL /* Temperature in the office */,
  "office_humid" REAL /* Humidity in the office */,
  "bath_temp" REAL /* Temperature in the bathroom */,
  "bath_humid" REAL /* Humidity in the bathroom */,
  "outside_temp" REAL /* Temperature outside the home */,
  "outside_humid" REAL /* Humidity outside the home */,
  "ironing_temp" REAL /* Temperature in the ironing room */,
  "ironing_humid" REAL /* Humidity in the ironing room */,
  "teen_temp" REAL /* Temperature in the teenager's room */,
  "teen_humid" REAL /* Humidity in the teenager's room */,
  "parents_temp" REAL /* Temperature in the parent's room */,
  "parents_humid" REAL /* Humidity in the parent's room */,
  "station_temp" REAL /* Temperature at the weather station */,
  "press_mm_hg" REAL /* Barometric pressure at the weather station in millimeters of mercury */,
  "station_humid" REAL /* Humidity at the weather station */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Windspeed at the weather station */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility at the weather station */,
  "tdewpoint" REAL /* Dew point temperature at the weather station */,
  "rv1" REAL /* Reserved value 1 (for future use) */,
  "rv2" REAL /* Reserved value 2 (for future use) */,
  "kitchen_feel" REAL /* Feeling temperature in the kitchen */,
  "appliance_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about each appliance */,
  "energy_cost" REAL /* Cost of energy consumption */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Alert status (e.g., high temperature, high humidity) */,
  "forecasted_energy" REAL /* Predicted energy usage */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, energy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_home_data_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_id") REFERENCES homes ("home_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_home_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update from the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the weather station (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "homes" (
  "home_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home */,
  "home_address" TEXT /* Address of the home */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the home owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the home owner */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station providing external weather data */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the HEMS was installed */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update from the home */,
  "smart_device_count" INTEGER /* Number of smart devices integrated with the HEMS */,
  "energy_plan" TEXT /* Energy plan selected by the homeowner (e.g., standard, green) */,
  "user_preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., temperature settings, alert thresholds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("home_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_homes_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, energy) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor within the home */,
  "home_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the home */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_id") REFERENCES homes ("home_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "home_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the home */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sensor */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high temperature, high humidity) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_id") REFERENCES homes ("home_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy plan */,
  "rate" REAL /* Cost per unit of energy */,
  "renewable_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of renewable energy in the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)
